description: Material Passport for Stage 2 — Analysis Plan. Tracks all artifacts produced during SAP development and statistical methodology planning.

required_artifacts.name: 统计分析计划 (SAP)
required_artifacts.description: Complete SAP document specifying all planned analyses, methods, endpoints, and multiplicity strategy.

required_artifacts.name: 终点定义
required_artifacts.description: Precise operational definitions of all primary, secondary, and exploratory endpoints.

required_artifacts.name: 样本量论证
required_artifacts.description: Sample size calculation with assumptions, power analysis, and effect size justification.

required_artifacts.name: 分析方法一览表
required_artifacts.description: Mapping of each research question/hypothesis to its statistical method, endpoint, population, and table/figure number.

required_artifacts.name: 多重比较控制策略
required_artifacts.description: Pre-specified strategy for controlling Type I error across multiple comparisons (e.g., hierarchical testing, Bonferroni, FDR).

required_artifacts.name: 表格模板
required_artifacts.description: Pre-defined shells for all planned tables, figures, and listings (TFLs) with row/column structure.

required_artifacts.name: 敏感性分析计划
required_artifacts.description: Pre-specified sensitivity analyses, subgroup analyses, and their justification.

optional_artifacts.name: 期中分析计划
optional_artifacts.description: Details of any planned interim analyses including stopping boundaries and data monitoring committee charter.

optional_artifacts.name: SAP修正案
optional_artifacts.description: History of SAP amendments with rationale and approval dates.

optional_artifacts.name: 统计咨询记录
optional_artifacts.description: Log of consultations with the trial statistician or external experts.

quality_gates.name: SAP完整性检查
quality_gates.description: SAP covers all endpoints, all analysis populations, and all planned TFLs.

quality_gates.name: 方法适当性审查
quality_gates.description: Statistical methods are appropriate for the data types and research questions.

quality_gates.name: 多重比较方案审查
quality_gates.description: Multiplicity control is adequate for the number of comparisons and endpoints.

quality_gates.name: 样本量论证充分性
quality_gates.description: Sample size is justified with realistic assumptions and adequate power.
